title: acm----动态规划
content:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std;

int d[200][200];
int N;

int maxSum(int i,int j){
    if(i==N) return d[i][j];
    int sum1=maxSum(i+1,j);
    int sum2=maxSum(i+1,j+1);
    if(sum1>sum2) return sum1+d[i][j];
    return sum2+d[i][j];
}

int main()
{
    cin>>N;
    for(int i=1;i<=N;i++)
        for(int j=1;j<=i;j++)
            cin>>d[i][j];
    cout<<maxSum(1,1);
    return 0;
}
#include <bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std;

int d[200][200];
int N;
int Sum[200][200];

int maxSum(int i,int j){
    if(i==N) return d[i][j];
    if(Sum[i+1][j]==-1) Sum[i+1][j]=maxSum(i+1,j);
    if(Sum[i+1][j+1]==-1) Sum[i+1][j+1]=maxSum(i+1,j+1);
    if(Sum[i+1][j]>Sum[i+1][j+1]) return Sum[i+1][j]+d[i][j];
    return Sum[i+1][j+1]+d[i][j];
}

int main()
{
    cin>>N;
    for(int i=1;i<=N;i++)
        for(int j=1;j<=i;j++){
            cin>>d[i][j];
            Sum[i][j]=-1;
        }
    cout<<maxSum(1,1);
    return 0;
}
#include <bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std;

int d[200][200];
int N;

int main()
{
    cin>>N;
    for(int i=1;i<=N;i++)
        for(int j=1;j<=i;j++){
            cin>>d[i][j];
        }
    for(int i=N;i>1;i--)
        for(int j=1;j<i;j++){
            if(d[i][j]>d[i][j+1]) d[i-1][j]=d[i-1][j]+d[i][j];
            else d[i-1][j]=d[i-1][j]+d[i][j+1];
        }
    cout<<d[1][1];
    return 0;
}
#include <bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std;

int main()
{
    int a[7],b[7],n;
    cin >>n;
    for(int i=0;i<n;i++) {cin >>a[i]; b[i]=1;}
    for(int i=0;i<n;i++)
        for(int j=0;j<i;j++)
            if(a[j]<a[i]) b[i]=max(b[i],b[j]+1);
    for(int i=0;i<n;i++) if(b[i]>b[0]) b[0]=b[i];
    cout<<b[0];
    return 0;
}
#include <bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std;


void test_1_wei_bag_problem() {
    vector<int> weight = {1, 3, 4};
    vector<int> value = {15, 20, 30};
    int bagWeight = 4;

    // 初始化
    vector<int> dp(bagWeight + 1, 0);
    for(int i = 0; i < weight.size(); i++) { // 遍历物品
        for(int j = bagWeight; j >= weight[i]; j--) { // 遍历背包容量
            dp[j] = max(dp[j], dp[j - weight[i]] + value[i]);
        }
    }
    cout << dp[bagWeight] << endl;
}

int main() {
    test_1_wei_bag_problem();
}
